title: brachiaria notochthona
intro: Brachiaria notochthona, also known as Urochloa notochthona, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Brachiaria notochthona include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Brachiaria notochthona is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in folk remedies to treat ailments such as coughs and colds.
